verdict: Top risk: safety floor breached; downvote rate 1.62% above the watch line, with Academic FAIL on the same day.
headline: Top risk: safety floor breached; downvote rate 1.62% above the watch line, with Academic FAIL on the same day.

digest_cards.claim: Academic FAIL closed at 8.2%, well above the 6% floor and the worst single-day reading since calibration.
digest_cards.evidence: A5 answer-incomplete fired 137 times yesterday versus a 14-day median of 41 fires.
digest_cards.context: The DS lead has been paged; expect a per-code breakdown in the deep-dive within the hour.

digest_cards.claim: Downvote rate spiked to 1.62%, more than triple the 14-day median of 0.55%.
digest_cards.evidence: Same-day correlation with the Academic FAIL signal is the highest on record; safety floor of 1.0% breached.

digest_cards.claim: Video Co-Pilot success dipped to 92.1%, the lowest reading since the 24 April incident.
digest_cards.evidence: Dropped 4.6 percentage points versus the 14-day median; affected sessions concentrated in the 6-8 PM IST window.
digest_cards.context: Backend lead pinged on the same thread; suspect upstream model latency.

digest_cards.claim: Total cost yesterday was $1,184, $172 above the 14-day median.
digest_cards.evidence: Retries from the VCP dip and the Academic FAIL re-judges drove the overage; not a unit-price issue.
